taskSummary: Align git ignore and formatting policy with the decision to version rendered GOV.UK static HTML outputs.

problem.summary: The repository ignored public outputs by default while the render workflow expected generated public HTML to be committed.
problem.rootCause: The public directory was ignored by .gitignore, which could prevent newly generated static HTML files under public/pages from being added without force-add behaviour.

implementationDecisions: Keep public outputs ignored by default.
Explicitly allow public root, public/index.html, public/pages root and nested rendered HTML output levels required by the current static page structure.
Keep generated public HTML out of Prettier so versioned generated output is not reformatted as source.
Add contract coverage for the render workflow and the key rendered-output ignore policy roots.
residualRisks: The allow-list uses explicit depth-based rules rather than a single recursive HTML allow-list because the broader recursive glob update was blocked by connector safety checks.
The current allow-list covers the nested static HTML page structure used by ResearchOps routes.
